spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Psionics)
headerEntries: Qunbraxel casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}):

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Qualux has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Qualux makes two Eldritch Bolt attacks, or one Eldritch Bolt attack and one Tentacle attack.

action.name: Tentacle
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d10 + 4}) psychic damage. If the target is Medium or smaller, it has the {@condition grappled} condition (escape {@dc 16}) and must succeed on a {@dc 16} Intelligence saving throw or have the {@condition stunned} condition until the grapple ends.

action.name: Eldritch Bolt
entries: {@atk rs} {@hit 8} to hit, range 120 ft., one target. {@h}20 ({@damage 3d10 + 4}) force damage.

action.name: Extract Brain
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one Humanoid with the {@condition stunned} condition who is {@condition grappled} by Qualux. {@h}55 ({@damage 10d10}) piercing damage. If this damage reduces the target to 0 hit points, Qualux kills it by extracting and devouring its brain.

action.name: Mind Blast {@recharge 5}
entries: Qualux magically emits psychic energy in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in that area must succeed on a {@dc 16} Intelligence saving throw or take 26 ({@damage 5d8 + 4}) psychic damage and have the {@condition stunned} condition for 1 minute. A {@condition stunned} creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

The mind flayer Qualux is the newly-ascended leader of the Empty-Scabbard Killers. He was a tadpole when Orcus appeared in Cyrog’s chamber, carried away as one of the few still-living groups of illithids fled from the Demon Prince of Undeath. He was lost in the Darklake, dropped as the illithids swam across, and, drawn to psionic energy, he eventually swam and wriggled his way through the cracks and down into Whorlstone, where he wriggled into the ear of one of the Empty-Scabbard Killers.

The transformation was quick and brutal, and from it emerged Qualux, full of vigor and eager to create a new colony here beneath Gracklstugh. With such a vast population so near, he immediately set to work capturing and converting duergar assassins until he’d taken complete control of the Empty-Scabbard Killers.

Presently, Qualux is eagerly awaiting the hatching of several tadpoles, with which he intends to create the colony’s first generation of illithids, as well as the maturation of an elder brain he birthed from the remains of the assassins' former leader.

conditionImmune.note: while wearing Mind Carapace Plate Armor

trait.name: Erratic Movement
entries: {@action Opportunity attack|phb|opportunity attacks} against Uskvil are made with disadvantage.

trait.name: Evasion
entries: If Uskvil is subjected to an effect that allows him to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, Uskvil instead takes no damage if he succeeds on the saving throw, and only half damage if he fails.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Uskvil has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Sneak Attack (1/Turn)
entries: Uskvil deals an extra 14 ({@damage 4d6}) damage when he hits a target with a weapon attack and has advantage on the attack roll, or when the target is within 5 feet of an ally of the Uskvil's that isn't {@condition incapacitated} and the Uskvil doesn't have disadvantage on the attack roll.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, Uskvil has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks that rely on sight.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Uskvil makes three melee attacks.

action.name: Dagger
entries: {@atk mw,rw} {@hit +8} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d4 + 5}) piercing damage.

action.name: Light Crossbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit +8} to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) piercing damage.

action.name: Maddening Convulsions {@recharge 5}
entries: Uskvil's body contorts and spasms in bizarre ways, confounding other creatures. Each non-derro creature within 5 feet of Uskvil that can see it must succeed on a {@dc 15} Wisdom saving throw or be affected as if by a {@spell confusion} spell for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to Uskvil's Maddening Convulsions for the next 24 hours.

One of three leaders of the Gray Ghosts and their master thief, tasked with their most difficult missions. Has had numerous residences within the West Cleft District, but now resides in the Whorlstone Tunnels, where he assists Pliinki in her research. Hoping that the Demogorgonic corruption of the duergar populus will leave them defenseless against a rebellion.

bonus.name: Erratic Movement
entries: Uskvil can take the {@action Disengage} or {@action Hide} action as a bonus action on each of his turns.

trait.name: Suave Defense
entries: While Zubriska is wearing light or no armor and wielding no {@item shield|PHB}, her AC includes her Charisma modifier.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Zubriska has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Sneak Attack (1/Turn).
entries: Zubriska deals an extra 14 ({@dice 4d6}) damage when she hits a target with a weapon attack and has advantage on the attack roll, or when the target is within 5 feet of an ally of Zubriska's that isn't {@condition incapacitated} and Zubriska doesn't have disadvantage on the attack roll.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, Zubriska has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks that rely on sight.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Zubriska makes one Dagger attack and two Rapier attacks.

action.name: Dagger
entries: {@atk mw,rw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d4 + 4}) piercing damage.

action.name: Rapier
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) piercing damage.

bonus.name: Lightfooted
entries: Zubriska takes the {@action Dash} or {@action Disengage} action.

Twin sister of Aliinka and one of three leaders of the Gray Ghosts along with Uskvil. She resides in the Whorlstone Tunnels where she manages and oversees Gray Ghost operatives throughout the Gracklstugh.

trait.name: Telepathic Bond
entries: Shal ignores the range restriction on its telepathy when communicating with a creature it has {@condition charmed}. The two don't even need to be on the same plane of existence.

trait.name: Shapechanger
entries: Shal can use her action to polymorph into a Small or Medium humanoid, or back into her true form. Without wings, Shal loses her flying speed. Other than her size and speed, her statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment she is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. Shal reverts to her true form if she dies.

action.name: Claw (Fiend Form Only)
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) slashing damage.

action.name: Charm
entries: One humanoid Shal can see within 30 feet of her must succeed on a {@dc 15} Wisdom saving throw or be magically {@condition charmed} for 1 day. The {@condition charmed} target obeys Shal's verbal or telepathic commands. If the target suffers any harm or receives a suicidal command, it can repeat the saving throw, ending the effect on a success. If the target successfully saves against the effect, or if the effect on it ends, the target is immune to Shal's Charm for the next 24 hours.
Shal can have only one target {@condition charmed} at a time. If she charms another, the effect on the previous target ends.

action.name: Draining Kiss
entries: Shal kisses a creature {@condition charmed} by it or a willing creature. The target must make a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw against this magic, taking 32 ({@damage 5d10 + 5}) psychic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The target's hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hit point maximum to 0.

action.name: Etherealness
entries: Shal magically enters the Ethereal Plane from the Material Plane, or vice versa.

Shal is a disguised succubus and loyal servant of the demon lord Graz'zt. Her only task is to make sure no one tries to rid Horgar of his madness. The gown she wears was a gift from Horgar. It weighs 75 pounds and is worth 750 gp.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Rystia has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Enchanting Presence
entries: Any non-eladrin creature that starts its turn within 60 feet of Rystia must make a {@dc 16} Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the creature becomes {@condition charmed} by the eladrin for 1 minute. On a successful save, the creature becomes immune to any eladrin's Enchanting Presence for 24 hours.
Whenever Rystia deals damage to the {@condition charmed} creature, the {@condition charmed} creature can repeat the saving throw, ending the effect on itself on a success.

trait.name: Alert
entries: +5 bonus to initiative.
Can't be surprised while she is conscious.
Other creatures don't gain advantage on attack rolls against her as a result of being unseen by her.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Rystia makes two Longsword or Longbow attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d8 + 1}) slashing damage, or 6 ({@damage 1d10 + 1}) slashing damage if used with two hands, plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Summer: fire damage, Winter: cold damage, Spring and Autumn: psychic damage.

action.name: Longbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 7} to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) piercing damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Summer: fire damage, Winter: cold damage, Spring and Autumn: psychic damage.

action.name: Ring of Invisibility
entries: While wearing this ring, Rystia can turn {@condition invisible} as an action. Anything she is wearing or carrying is {@condition invisible} with her. She remains {@condition invisible} until the ring is removed, until she attacks or cast a spell, or until she uses a bonus action to become visible again.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: Rystia casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components (unless otherwise stated) and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}):

bonus.name: Fey Step {@recharge 4}
entries: Rystia teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

reaction.name: Foster Peace
entries: If a creature {@condition charmed} by Rystia hits with an attack roll while within 60 feet of her, she magically causes the attack to miss, provided Rystia can see the attacker.

monster.name: Stool

trait.name: Myconid Trait: Distress Spores
entries: When Stool takes damage, all other myconids within 240 feet of it can sense its pain.

trait.name: Myconid Trait: Sun Sickness
entries: While in sunlight, Stool has disadvantage on ability checks, attack rolls, and saving throws. Stool dies if it spends more than 1 hour in direct sunlight.

trait.name: Myconid Trait: False Appearance
entries: While Stool remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary fungus.

trait.name: Cleric Trait: Potent Cantrips
entries: Stool can add its spellcasting ability modifier to the damage it deals with any cantrip.

trait.name: Myconid Trait: Mycelium Defense
entries: So long as Stool is wearing no armor, and wielding no shield, its body instinctually produces a thin layer of mucus which prevents it from being {@condition grappled} onto and increases is natural defenses. Its AC equals 10 + its Constitution modifier + its Wisdom modifier.

trait.name: Myconid Trait: Mycelial Song
entries: Stool can emit a low frequency song depending on its mood.

trait.name: Inventory: Cloak of Elvenkind
entries: Stool is wearing a {@item cloak of elvenkind}

trait.name: Inventory: Ring of Evasion
entries: Stool is wearing a {@item ring of evasion}

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Stool makes a Body Slam attack and a Spore attack. They may replace their Body Slam with a use of Spellcasting.

action.name: Body Slam
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 2d4 + 1}) bludgeoning damage, plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) poison damage.

action.name: Rapport Spores
entries: A 10-foot radius of spores extends from the myconid. These spores can go around corners and affect only creatures with an Intelligence of 2 or higher that aren’t undead, constructs, or elementals. Affected creatures can communicate telepathically with one another on any plane of existence for the next 8 hours.

action.name: Pacifying Spores
entries: Stool ejects spores at one creature it can see within 10 feet of it. The target must succeed on a {@dc 18} Constitution saving throw or be {@condition stunned} for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

action.name: Hallucination Spores
entries: Stool ejects spores at one creature it can see within 10 feet of it. The target must succeed on a {@dc 18} Constitution saving throw or be {@condition poisoned} for 1 minute. The {@condition poisoned} target is {@condition incapacitated} while it hallucinates. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

action.name: Animating Spores
entries: Stool targets one corpse of a humanoid or a Large or smaller beast within 5 feet of it and releases spores at the corpse. In 24 hours, the corpse rises as a spore servant. The corpse stays animated for {@dice 1d4 + 1} weeks or until destroyed, and it can't be animated again in this way.
Stool is a young myconid sprout from Neverlight Grove. On their first journey beyond the grove, Stool wandered into unfamiliar territory and nearly drowned, panicking as they called out for help.
Their cries were answered by Sarith, a runaway drow, who pulled Stool to safety—only for them both to be swiftly captured by drow slavers and taken to the prison outpost of Velkynvelve.

To the party, Stool quickly became the little brother: endlessly talkative, eager to tell stories, and thrilled by the idea of adventure. Over the course of the Out of the Abyss campaign, Stool has grown steadily in strength and confidence. As their spores awaken and their presence deepens, it becomes clear that Stool is destined to one day grow into the next Sovereign of Neverlight Grove.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Stool is a 7th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save {@dc 18}, +10 to hit with spell attacks). Stool has the following Cleric and Bard spells prepared:

languages: primordial and sylvan cannot speak verbally uses rapport spores

reaction.name: Ring of Evasion
entries: This ring has 3 charges, and it regains {@dice 1d3} expended charges daily at dawn. When you fail a Dexterity saving throw while wearing the ring, you can take a Reaction to expend 1 charge to succeed on that save instead.

bonus.name: Vital Spore
entries: Stool casts {@spell Aura of Vitality} a number of times per long rest equal to its spellcasting modifier.

monster.name: Spinky

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The spider can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

trait.name: Web Walker
entries: The spider ignores movement restrictions caused by webbing.

trait.name: Web Sense
entries: While in contact with a web, the spider knows the exact location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

trait.name: Sure-Footed
entries: The spider has advantage on Strength and Dexterity saving throws made against effects that would knock it {@condition prone}.

trait.name: Wooly Cover
entries: The spider's thick wool provides half cover to Medium creatures and three-quarters cover to Small and Tiny creatures that ride on its back.

trait.name: Flammable Fluff
entries: If the spider takes fire damage, it has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks until the end of its next turn.

languages: understands common and elvish but does not speak.

action.name: Pick Up Allies
entries: The spider picks up three Medium or smaller willing creatures and places them safely on its wooly back. Creatures considered Tiny do not take up a spot.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}16 ({@damage 2d10 + 5}) piercing damage, plus and the target must make a {@dc 16} Constitution saving throw, taking ({@damage 6d8}) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. If the poison damage reduces the target to 0 hit points, the target is stable but  {@condition poisoned} for 1 hour, even after regaining hit points, and is  {@condition paralyzed} while {@condition poisoned} in this way.

action.name: Web {@recharge 5}
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit +8} to hit, range 60/120 ft., one Large or smaller creature. {@h}The target is {@condition restrained} by webbing. As an action, the {@condition restrained} target can make a {@dc 18} Strength check, bursting the webbing on a success. The webbing can also be attacked and destroyed (AC 10; hp 20; vulnerability to fire damage; immunity to bludgeoning, poison, and psychic damage).

reaction.name: Floof Up
entries: When a creature riding the spider is hit with an attack, the spider can use its reaction to floof up its wool, causing the attacks damage to be reduced by {@dice 1d4}. If the creature is hit with a critical hit, the critical is nullified and turned into a normal attack. The damage reduction does not apply to critical hits.

With care and nurture, the giant spider egg grows into an enormous wooly spider. This enormous wooly spider is friendly to you and your companions. It will happily carry friendly creatures, as well as equipment up to its carrying capacity, holding everything in its thick wool. Unless trained to fight, it tries to pick up you and your companions on its huge back and run away from any perceived danger as soon as combat begins. It typically does not attack unless trained to, but it will defend itself from hostile creatures.

trait.name: Cunning Action
entries: On each of its turns, Jimjar can use a bonus action to take the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action.

trait.name: Sneak Attack (1/Turn)
entries: Jimjar deals an extra 7 ({@dice 2d6}) damage when it hits a target with a weapon attack and has advantage on the attack roll, or when the target is within 5 feet of an ally of Jimjar that isn't {@condition incapacitated} and Jimjar doesn't have disadvantage on the attack roll.

trait.name: Gnome Cunning
entries: Jimjar has advantage on all Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws against magic.

trait.name: Stone Camouflage
entries: Jimjar has advantage on Dexterity ({@skill Stealth}) checks to hide in rocky terrain.

trait.name: Tymoras Blessing (Long rest recharge)
entries: Blessed by the Goddess of Luck, Jimjar has 4 luck points. Whenever he makes an attack roll, an ability check, or a saving throw, he can spend one luck point to roll an additional {@dice d20}. He can choose to spend one of his luck points after you roll the die, but before the outcome is determined. He choose which of the d20s is used for the attack roll, ability check, or saving throw. He can also spend one luck point when an attack roll is made against him. Roll a {@dice d20}, and then choose whether the attack uses the attacker's roll or his. If more than one creature spends a luck point to influence the outcome of a roll, the points cancel each other out; no additional dice are rolled.

trait.name: Helpful
entries: Jimjar is adept at giving well-timed assistance; Jimjar can take the Help action as a bonus action.

trait.name: Coordinated Strike
entries: When Jimjar uses his Helpful feature to aid an ally in attacking, that target can be up to 30 feet away from Jimjar, and Jimjar can deal an extra {@damage 2d6} damage to it the next time he hits it with an attack roll before the end of the current turn. The extra damage is the same type of damage dealt by the attack.

trait.name: Evasion
entries: If Jimjar is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, Jimjar instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the saving throw, and only half damage if it fails.

trait.name: Inspiring Help
entries: When the sidekick takes the Help action, the creature who receives the help also gains a {@dice 1d6} bonus to the {@dice d20} roll. If that roll is an attack roll, the creature can forgo adding the bonus to it, and then if the attack hits, the creature can add the bonus to the attack's damage roll against one target.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Jimjar makes two melee attacks.

action.name: Rapier
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit +9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) piercing damage.

action.name: Dagger
entries: {@atk mw,rw} {@hit +9} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d4 + 5}) piercing damage.

action.name: Hand Crossbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit +9} to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d6 + 5}) piercing damage.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: Jimjar's innate spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save {@dc 13}). Jimjar can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

bonus.name: Help
entries: Jimjar aids an ally in a task or in attacking a creature within 5 feet of you. The creature you aid gains advantage on the next ability check or attack roll it makes before the start of your next turn.

bonus.name: Dash
entries: Jimjar gains extra movement for the current turn. The increase equals his speed.

bonus.name: Disengage
entries: Jimjar's movement doesn't provoke opportunity attacks for the rest of the turn.

bonus.name: Hide
entries: Jimjar can attempt to make a Dexterity (Stealth) check as a bonus action.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Derendil is a 7th-level spellcaster. Her spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save {@dc 18}, +10 to hit with spell attacks). Derendil has the following Druid spells prepared:

trait.name: Eladrin Trait: Magic Resistance
entries: Derendil has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Eladrin Trait: Sorrowful Presence
entries: Any hostile that starts its turn within 60 feet Derendil  must make a {@dc 15} Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the creature becomes {@condition charmed} by Derendil for 1 minute. While {@condition charmed} in this way, the creature has disadvantage on ability checks and saving throws. The {@condition charmed} creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns. The creature is immune to any eladrin's Sorrowful Presence for the next 24 hours upon success. Whenever Derendil deals damage to the {@condition charmed} creature, the {@condition charmed} creature can repeat the saving throw.

trait.name: Druid Trait: Potent Cantrips
entries: Derendil can add her spellcasting ability modifier to the damage she deals with any cantrip.

trait.name: Eladrin Trait: Fae Retribution
entries: All attacks made by Derendil are considered magical for the sake of overcoming magical resistances.

trait.name: Inventory: Longbow of Melodies
entries: Derendil wields a {@item Longbow of Melodies|BMT}.

trait.name: Inventory: Cloak of Elvenkind
entries: Derendil is wearing a {@item Cloak of Elvenkind}.

trait.name: Inventory: Flame Tongue Scimitar
entries: Derendil wields a {@item Flame Tongue Scimitar}.

trait.name: Eladrin Seasons
entries: Derendil can choose her eladrin season a number of times per level equal to her proficiency bonus. This change happens over a long rest. She gets seasonal bonuses according to the list below.
1. Autumn: Necrotic.
2. Winter: Cold. (Derendil was born in the season of winter.)
3. Spring: Radiant.
4. Summer: Fire.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Derendil makes two Longsword or Longbow attacks. She can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

action.name: Flame Tongue Scimitar
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit +8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) slashing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) fire damage and 13 ({@damage 3d8}) seasonal damage.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 1}) slashing damage, or 5 ({@damage 1d10 + 1}) slashing damage if used with two hands, plus 13 ({@damage 3d8}) seasonal damage.

action.name: Longbow of Melodies, Melody of Reverberation
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 8} to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) piercing damage plus 13 ({@damage 3d8}) seasonal damage and ({@damage 2}) thunder damage

bonus.name: Fey Step {@recharge 4}
entries: Derendil teleports, along with any equipment she is wearing or carrying, up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space she can see.

reaction.name: Frigid Rebuke
entries: When Derendil takes damage from a creature she can see within 60 feet, she can force that creature to make a {@dc 18} Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the creature takes 11 ({@damage 2d10}) cold damage.
Derendil’s story begins eons ago, before Araushnee’s fall and the birth of Lolth.

She was the daughter of Glacelith, a powerful {@creature Bheur Hag} who coveted her sister’s Domain of Delight. Desiring that power, Glacelith planned to sell her own daughter to Orcus, offering Derendil as a bride in exchange for the strength to murder her sister—the Archfey Sarfa, ruler of the Seasons Kingdom.
Sarfa learned of the plot before it could be carried out. She kidnapped Derendil as an infant and raised her as her own daughter, hiding her away within the Seasons Kingdom.

Orcus, however, did not relinquish his promised bride so easily. On a single tragic night, his influence helped bring about the fall of the Seasons Kingdom. In the aftermath, Derendil became the first victim of Vecna’s Resurrection Curse, condemning her to an endless cycle of reincarnation—each life reborn as a quaggoth.
In the present day, Derendil awakens once more: a quaggoth prisoner held within the drow outpost of Velkynvelve.

trait.name: Stone Camouflage
entries: Hilari has advantage on Dexterity ({@skill Stealth}) checks made to hide in rocky terrain.

trait.name: Siege Stance
entries: Hilari's sheer size commands attention, unless actively engaged, any hostile creature within 20 feet of her is considered distracted by her giving her allies advantage on the next attack against that creature. Once a creature is successfully hit (takes damage) it is no longer considered distracted until the beginning of Hilari's next turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Hilari makes two Warhammer attacks.

action.name: Warhammer
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit +11} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}20 ({@damage 3d8 + 7}) bludgeoning damage, or 23 ({@damage 3d10 + 7}) damage if used with two hands.

action.name: Rock
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit +11} to hit, range 60/240 ft., one target. {@h}29 ({@damage 4d10 + 7}) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a {@dc 19} Strength saving throw or be knocked {@condition prone}.

action.name: Stones's Wrath (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: With a stomp of her foot, Hilari targets up to three visible creatures standing on the ground within 60 feet of her. The earth fractures beneath them, attempting to hold them in place. The creature must succeed a {@dc 18} Strength or Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save it takes ({@damage 2d8}) bludgeoning and is {@condition restrained} for 1 minute. The damage is repeated at the beginning of each of its turns until freed. Creatures can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns.

bonus.name: Resonate Rune
entries: Immediately after Hilari hits a target that is standing on the ground with an attack roll, she deals an extra 9 ({@damage 2d8}) force damage and forces that target to make a {@dc 19} Strength saving throw. On a failed save, the target is pushed up to 10 feet away and knocked {@condition prone}.

reaction.name: Rock Catching
entries: If a rock or similar object is hurled at Hilari, she can, with a successful {@dc 10} Dexterity saving throw, catch the missile and take no bludgeoning damage from it.

reaction.name: Stone Sheild
entries: If an ally within 10 feet of Hilari is the target of an attack, she can impose disadvantage on the attack. Additionally, Hilari's shield has 5 stone charges that replenish on a short rest and can be used as followed:

• If Hilari and any allies within 10 feet of her are subject to an effect that allows them to make a Dexterity saving throw, the throw is made at advantage and any damage delt by the effect is halved. (Cost is 1 charge per ally protected.)
• If Hilari is hit with a critical hit, she can nullify the crit to a normal attack. (Cost is 2 charges.)
• If an ally within 10 feet of Hilari is hit with a critical hit, she can nullify the crit to a normal attack. (Cost is 3 charges.)

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Hilari has a limited pool or magic granted to her by her god Skoraeus Stonebones using Constitution is her spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 17}, {@hit +9} to hit with spell attacks):

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The spider can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

trait.name: Web Sense
entries: While in contact with a web, the spider knows the exact location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

trait.name: Web Walker
entries: The spider ignores movement restrictions caused by webbing.

trait.name: Ethereal Jaunt
entries: As a bonus action, the sword spider can magically shift from the Material Plane to the Ethereal Plane, or vice versa.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The spider makes three attacks: two with its forelegs and one with its bite.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) piercing damage, and the target must make a {@dc 13} Constitution saving throw, taking 18 ({@damage 4d8}) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

action.name: Foreleg
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) slashing damage.

action.name: Deadly Leap
entries: If the spider jumps at least 15 feet as part of its movement, it can then use this action to land on its feet in a space that contains one or more other creatures. Each of those creatures must succeed on a {@dc 18} Strength or Dexterity saving throw (target's choice) or be knocked {@condition prone} and take 27 ({@damage 5d8 + 5}) slashing damage. On a successful save, the creature takes only half the damage, isn't knocked {@condition prone}, and is pushed 5 feet out of the spider's space into an unoccupied space of the creature's choice. If no unoccupied space is with in range, the creature instead falls {@condition prone} in the spider's space.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The cult head casts one of the following spells using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}):

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The cult head uses Insanity Gaze. It then makes two Quarterstaff attacks or two Bolt of Madness attacks.

action.name: Quarterstaff
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit +6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) bludgeoning damage, or 6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) bludgeoning damage if used with two hands, plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) psychic damage.

action.name: Bolt of Madness
entries: {@atk rs} {@hit +8} to hit, range 90 ft., one creature. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) psychic damage, and the target must succeed on a {@dc 16} Wisdom saving throw or it must use its reaction to make a melee weapon attack against one visible creature of the cult head's choice. Constructs and Undead are immune to this effect.

action.name: Insanity Gaze
entries: The cult head fixes its gaze on one creature it can see within 30 feet of it. The target must succeed on {@dc 16} Wisdom saving throw or suffer the effect of the {@spell confusion} spell without making a saving throw. The effect lasts until the start of the cult head's next turn.

action.name: Duplicate Self {@recharge 5}
entries: The cult head creates an illusory duplicate of itself, which appears in its space and lasts for 1 minute. On its turn, the cult head can move the illusory duplicate a distance equal to its walking speed (no action required). The first time a creature or an object interacts physically with cult head (for example, by hitting it with an attack), there is a {@chance 50} chance that the illusory duplicate is affected, not the cult head, in which case the illusion disappears.

bonus.name: Divine Word
entries: The cult head casts {@spell divine word} using Charisma as the spellcasting ability.

Narrak belongs to a fringe group within the Council of Savants using demonology as a path to power. Since the arrival of the demon lords, he has gathered and bullied several apprentices to participate in rituals aimed to sow chaos in Gracklstugh. Narrak knows the stone giants are a pillar of the Deepking's power, and that cursing them with Demogorgon's madness will be an appropriate first step toward delivering the entire city to the demon lord. He calls himself the High priest of Demogorgon and shadow leader of the Council of Savants.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Narrak has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, Narrak has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks that rely on sight.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If Themberchaud fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Undead Fortitude
entries: If damage reduces Themberchaud to 0 hit points, it must make a Constitution saving throw with a DC of 5 + the damage taken, unless the damage is radiant or from a critical hit. On a success, Themberchaud drops to 1 hit point instead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Themberchaud can use its Frightful Presence. It then makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 14} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}19 ({@damage 2d10 + 8}) piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) fire damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 14} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d6 + 8}) slashing damage.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 14} to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. {@h}17 ({@damage 2d8 + 8}) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Frightful Presence
entries: Each creature of Themberchaud's choice that is within 120 feet of Themberchaud and aware of it must succeed on a {@dc 19} Wisdom saving throw or become {@condition frightened} for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to Themberchaud's Frightful Presence for the next 24 hours.

action.name: Baleful Breath {@recharge 5}
entries: Themberchaud exhales pestilent gas in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a {@dc 21} Dexterity saving throw, taking 63 ({@damage 18d6}) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

legendary.name: Detect
entries: Themberchaud makes a Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) check.

legendary.name: Tail Attack
entries: Themberchaud makes a tail attack.

legendary.name: Wing Attack (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: Themberchaud beats its wings. Each creature within 10 feet of Themberchaud must succeed on a {@dc 22} Dexterity saving throw or take 15 ({@damage 2d6 + 8}) bludgeoning damage and be knocked {@condition prone}. Themberchaud can then fly up to half its flying speed.

conditionImmune.special: Surprised if the surpriser is within 60 ft.

trait.name: Ooze Cube
entries: Glabbagool takes up its entire space. Other creatures can enter the space, but a creature that does so is subjected to Glabbagool's Engulf and has disadvantage on the saving throw.
Creatures inside Glabbagool can be seen but have total cover.

A creature within 5 feet of Glabbagool can take an action to pull a creature or object out of Glabbagool. Doing so requires a successful {@dc 16} Strength check, and the creature making the attempt takes 10 ({@damage 4d6}) acid damage.
Glabbagool can hold only one Large creature or up to four Medium or smaller creatures inside it at a time.

trait.name: Transparent
entries: Even when Glabbagool is in plain sight, it takes a successful {@dc 16} Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) check to spot a cube that has neither moved nor attacked. A creature that tries to enter Glabbagool's space while unaware of Glabbagool is {@quickref Surprise|PHB|3|0|surprised} by Glabbagool.

trait.name: Awakened
entries: Glabbagool can choose who their acid damages when a creature or multiple creatures are touching it or within it.

trait.name: Indomitable
entries: If Glabbagool fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: Glabbagool regains 10 hit points at the start of his turn. lf he takes lightning damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of his next turn. Glabbagool dies only if he starts its turn with 0 hit points and doesn't regenerate.

action.name: Extra Attack
entries: Glabbagool makes three pseudopod attacks.

action.name: Pseudopod
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}18 ({@damage 4d6 + 4}) bludgeoning damage, plus 14 ({@damage 4d6}) acid damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it is {@condition grappled} (escape {@dc 16}). Until this grapple ends, the target is {@condition restrained}, takes 14 {@damage 4d6} acid damage at the start of each of Glabbagool's turns, and he can't looses one use of his Pseudopod attack. He can have up too 3 creatures {@condition grappled} in this way.

action.name: Engulf
entries: Glabbagool moves up to its speed. While doing so, it can enter Large or smaller creatures' spaces. Whenever Glabbagool enters a creature's space, the creature must make a {@dc 16} Dexterity saving throw.
On a successful save, the creature can choose to be pushed 5 feet back or to the side of Glabbagool. A creature that chooses not to be pushed suffers the consequences of a failed saving throw.

On a failed save, Glabbagool enters the creature's space, and the creature takes 14 ({@damage 4d6}) acid damage and is engulfed. The engulfed creature can't breathe, is {@condition restrained}, and takes 26 ({@damage 8d6}) acid damage at the start of each of Glabbagool's turns. When Glabbagool moves, the engulfed creature moves with it.
An engulfed creature can try to escape by taking an action to make a {@dc 16} Strength check. On a success, the creature escapes and enters a space of its choice within 5 feet of Glabbagool.

immune.note: from nonmagical attacks that aren't silvered

trait.name: Shapechanger
entries: Topsy can use its action to polymorph into a rat-humanoid hybrid or into a giant rat, or back into its true form, which is humanoid. Its statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

trait.name: Keen Smell
entries: Topsy has advantage on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks that rely on smell.

trait.name: Gnome Cunning
entries: Topsy has advantage on all Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws against magic.

trait.name: Stone Camouflage
entries: Topsy has advantage on Dexterity ({@skill Stealth}) checks to hide in rocky terrain.

trait.name: Thieves Tools
entries: Topsy has expertise with thieves' tools.

trait.name: Evasion
entries: When Topsy is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, it instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the saving throw, and only half damage if it failed. The sidekick doesn't benefit from this feature while {@condition incapacitated}.

action.name: Multiattack (Humanoid or Hybrid Form Only)
entries: Topsy makes two attacks, only one of which can be a bite.

action.name: Bite (Rat or Hybrid Form Only)
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 5}) piercing damage. If the target is a humanoid, it must succeed on a {@dc 12} Constitution saving throw or be cursed with wererat lycanthropy.

action.name: Shortsword (Humanoid or Hybrid Form Only)
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 5}) piercing damage.

action.name: Hand Crossbow (Humanoid or Hybrid Form Only)
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 9} to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 5}) piercing damage.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: Topsy's innate spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save {@dc 10}). Topsy can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

bonus.name: Helpful
entries: Topsy is adept at giving well-timed assistance; the sidekick can take the {@action Help} action as a bonus action. When Topsy uses its Helpful feature to aid an ally in attacking a creature, that target can be up to 30 feet away from the sidekick, and the sidekick can deal an extra {@damage 2d6} damage to it the next time the sidekick hits it with an attack roll before the end of the current turn. The extra damage is the same type of damage dealt by the attack.

bonus.name: Cunning Action
entries: The sidekick's agility or quick thinking allows it to act speedily. On its turn in combat, it can take the  {@action Dash}, {@action Disengage}, or {@action Hide} action as a bonus action.

bonus.name: Inspiring Help
entries: When Topsy takes the {@action Help} action  the creature who receives the help also gains a {@dice 1d6} bonus to the {@dice d20} roll. If that roll is an attack roll, the creature can forgo adding the bonus to it, and then if the attack hits, the creature can add the bonus to the attack's damage roll against one target.

immune.note: from nonmagical attacks that aren't silvered

trait.name: Shapechanger
entries: Turvy can use its action to polymorph into a rat-humanoid hybrid or into a giant rat, or back into its true form, which is humanoid. Its statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

trait.name: Keen Smell
entries: Turvy has advantage on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks that rely on smell.

trait.name: Gnome Cunning
entries: Turvy has advantage on all Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws against magic.

trait.name: Stone Camouflage
entries: Turvy has advantage on Dexterity ({@skill Stealth}) checks to hide in rocky terrain.

trait.name: Improved Critical
entries: Turvy's attack rolls score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20 on the {@dice d20}.

trait.name: Battle Readiness
entries: Turvy has advantage on initiative rolls.

trait.name: Improved Defense
entries: Turvy's Armor Class increases by 1.

trait.name: Indomitable
entries: Turvy' can reroll a saving throw that he fails, but he must use the new roll. When he uses this feature, he can't use the feature again until he finishes a long rest.

action.name: Multiattack (Humanoid or Hybrid Form Only)
entries: Turvy makes two attacks, only one of which can be a bite.

action.name: Bite (Rat or Hybrid Form Only)
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}4 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) piercing damage. If the target is a humanoid, it must succeed on a {@dc 12} Constitution saving throw or be cursed with wererat lycanthropy.

action.name: Shortsword (Humanoid or Hybrid Form Only)
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) piercing damage.

action.name: Hand Crossbow (Humanoid or Hybrid Form Only)
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 8} to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) piercing damage.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: Turvy's innate spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save {@dc 10}). Turvy can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

bonus.name: Second Wind
entries: Turvy can use a bonus action on his turn to regain hit points equal to ({@dice 1d10 + 11}) his level in this class. Once it uses this feature, it must finish a short or long rest before it can use it again.

reaction.name: Martial Role Defender
entries: Turvy can use his reaction to impose disadvantage on the attack roll of a creature within 5 feet of it whose target isn't the Turvy, provided Turvy can see the attacker.

trait.name: Keen Hearing and Sight
entries: Eldeth has advantage on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks that rely on hearing or sight.

trait.name: Dwarven Resilience
entries: Eldeth has advantage on saving throws against poison and has resistance against poison damage.

trait.name: Martial Role Attacker
entries: Eldeth gains a +2 bonus to all attack rolls.

trait.name: Improved Critical
entries: Eldeth's attack rolls score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20 on the {@dice d20}.

trait.name: Battle Readiness
entries: Eldeth has advantage on initiative rolls.

trait.name: Indomitable
entries: Eldeth can reroll a saving throw that it fails, but it must use the new roll. When it uses this feature, it can't use the feature again until it finishes a long rest.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Eldeth makes two melee attacks or two ranged attacks and can replace any second attack with a use of her Holy Fire.

action.name: Maul
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit +10} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Holy Fire.
entries: Eldeth targets one creature she can see within 60 feet of her. The target must make a {@dc 15} Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the target takes ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) radiant damage radiant damage, and it is {@condition blinded} until the start of the war priest's next turn. On a successful save, the target takes half as much damage and isn't {@condition blinded}.

bonus.name: Healing Light {@recharge 4}
entries: Eldeth or one creature of her choice within 60 feet of her regains 12 ({@dice 2d8 + 3}) hit points.

bonus.name: Second Wind
entries: Eldeth can use a bonus action on her turn to regain hit points equal to ({@dice 1d10 + 11}) her level in this class. Once it uses this feature, it must finish a short or long rest before it can use it again.

trait.name: Firearms Knowledge
entries: Augustus's mastery of its weapons enables him to ignore the loading property of any firearm.

trait.name: Steady as She Goes
entries: On the deck of a ship, Augustus has advantage on ability checks and saving throws made against effects that would knock him {@condition prone} or shove it overboard.

trait.name: Shes My Girl
entries: Augustus cannot be disarmed or forced to drop Ming Ming due to her being his literal arm.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Augustus may use any combination of 2 of the following actions.

action.name: "Ming Ming" the Double-Barreled Force Musket
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 6} to hit, range 120/300 ft., one target. {@h}28 ({@damage 4d12 + 2}) force damage. On hit the target is {@condition stunned} until the beginning of Augustus's next turn.

action.name: Musket Whip
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d6 + 6}) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Ming Ming Boom!
entries: Augustus ends the {@condition frightened} condition on himself and each creature of its choice that it can see within 30 feet of him by firing a firework shot into the air with Ming Ming.

action.name: Force Grenade
entries: Augustus throws a grenade up to 60 feet, and the grenade explodes in a 20-foot-radius sphere. Each creature in that area must make a {@dc 15} Dexterity saving throw, taking 17 ({@damage 5d6}) force damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. After he throws the grenade, roll a {@dice d6}; on a roll of 3 or lower, he has no more grenades to throw.

bonus.name: Stomp Around
entries: Augustus may move up to his speed without provoking any opportunity attack.

trait.name: Stone Camouflage
entries: The gnome has advantage on Dexterity ({@skill Stealth}) checks made to hide in rocky terrain.

trait.name: Gnome Cunning
entries: The gnome has advantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws against magic.

trait.name: Arcane Recovery 1/day
entries: Recover spell slots equal to a combined level of 10. No slots greater then 6.

resist.special: Advantage on saving throws against spell and other magical effects

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Jaz is a 20th level Conjuration Wizard, using Intelligence as her spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 22}) (spell attack bonus 14):

action.name: Minor Conjuration
entries: Conjure up an inanimate object in your hand or on the ground in an unoccupied space that you can see within 10 feet of you. This object can be no larger than 3 feet on a side and weigh no more than 10 pounds, and its form must be that of a nonmagical object that you have seen. The object is visibly magical, radiating dim light out to 5 feet.
The object disappears after 1 hour, when you use this feature again, if it takes any damage, or if it deals any damage.

action.name: Benign Transposition
entries: Teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space that you can see. Alternatively, you can choose a space within range that is occupied by a Small or Medium creature. If that creature is willing, you both teleport, swapping places.
Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a long rest or you cast a conjuration spell of 1st level or higher.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Ralto makes two melee attacks, he can add Gaping Wound to any successful attack.

action.name: Doorway Rapier
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit +10} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. ({@damage 1d8 + 6}) piercing damage. On hit Ralto can immediately teleport to an open 5ft space on the other side of the creature if space is available.

action.name: Gaping Wound (3/Day)
entries: On a hit, the target starts bleeding, taking ({@dice 1d6}) damage at the start of each of its following turns. This effect lasts until the target heals.

reaction.name: Retaliate (3/Day)
entries: After being hit by a melee attack, Ralto can immediately make three attacks against the attacker with their signature attack.

conditionImmune.special: Cannot be disarmed or forced to drop his weapon

trait.name: Fey Ancestry
entries: Ralto has advantage on saving throws against being {@condition charmed}, and magic can't put Ralto to sleep.

trait.name: Nimble Escape
entries: Ralto can take the {@action Disengage} or {@action Hide} action as a bonus action on each of its turns.

bonus.name: Challenge Eye
entries: Ralto issues a challenge to a creature via the glyph in his clockwork eye. For 1 minute, if that creature attempts to attack a target other than Ralto, or attempts to move away from him, he immediately makes two attacks with his Doorway Rapier stopping their movement on a hit. This ends his Challenge even if the hits miss.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The Duchess has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Keen Smell
entries: The Duchess has advantage on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks that rely on smell.

trait.name: Poison Sense
entries: The Duchess can detect whether a substance is poisonous by taste, touch, or smell.

trait.name: Fey Defender
entries: All of The Duchess' attacks count as magical for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to nonmagical attacks and damage.

action.name: Multiattack.
entries: The Duchess makes 2 claw attack, or 1 bite.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}21 ({@damage 2d10 + 10}) piercing damage.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}21 ({@damage 2d6 + 10}) slashing damage. If The Duchess was {@condition invisible} before it attacked, the target must succeed on a {@dc 18} Strength saving throw or have the {@condition prone} condition. If the target has the {@condition prone} condition, The Duchess can make a Bite attack against it as a bonus action.

action.name: Fade Away
entries: The Dutchess magically becomes {@condition invisible} for 1 hour or until it attacks, gradually fading away over the course of her turn. It can choose to leave part of her body visible, such as her tail, her head, or her grinning mouth. Any equipment the cat wears or carries is {@condition invisible} with it.

bonus.name: Fade Back
entries: The Dutchess becomes visible or makes part of her body visible. Any equipment The Dutchess wears or carries on a visible part of her body also becomes visible.

bonus.name: Grinning Step
entries: The Dutchess teleports, along with any equipment she's wearing or carrying, up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

Grinning cats are mischievous Fey who delight in pestering and misleading travelers. They resemble oversized domestic cats with long, needlelike claws, but they're distinguished by the wide, toothy smiles that give them their name.

Grinning cats often dwell in or near giants' enclaves. They spend much of their time invisible, lounging on tree branches until prey—or a potential conversation partner—wanders by. While trading riddles or witticisms, a cat often decides to reveal its grin, its tail, or sometimes its whole head to confuse or intimidate the creature it's talking to.

A grinning cat can be persuaded to bestow one of its whiskers as a gift. A creature holding a whisker can use it to cast the misty step spell once, then the whisker turns to smoke and is destroyed. If a grinning cat is slain, {@dice 2d12} of its whiskers can be retrieved for this purpose.
My one and only interaction with a grinning cat made me want to wipe the smirk off that thing's face with a great big clenched fist, if you get my meaning.
Trust me when I tell you that the cat was every bit as annoyed as you were, my friend.

immune.special: poison, psychic; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks

monster.name: The Duchess Familiar
languages: understands Common and Sylvan but can't speak

trait.name: Detect Invisibility
entries: Within 60 feet The Duchess, magical invisibility fails to conceal anything from the tressym's sight.

trait.name: Keen Smell
entries: The Duchess has advantage on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks that rely on smell.

trait.name: Poison Sense
entries: The Duchess can detect whether a substance is poisonous by taste, touch, or smell.

trait.name: Familiar
entries: This is The Duchess of The Sand Gardens familiar form.

trait.name: Fey Defender
entries: All of The Duchess' attacks count as magical for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to nonmagical attacks and damage.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h} ({@dice 1d4 + 4}) slashing damage.

action.name: Fade Away
entries: The Dutchess magically becomes {@condition invisible} for 1 hour or until she attacks, gradually fading away over the course of her turn. She can choose to leave part of her body visible, such as her tail, or her head. Any equipment she wears or carries is {@condition invisible} with her.

bonus.name: Fade Back
entries: The Dutchess becomes visible or makes part of her body visible. Any equipment The Dutchess wears or carries on a visible part of her body also becomes visible.
